action.reasoning: Observation: The 35M model with 2 unfreezed layers achieved spearman_rho 0.5948. Analysis: To improve performance and generalization to >2 mutations, we can use a larger pre-trained model (ESM-2 150M) and an AttentionPooling layer to allow the model to focus on the mutated region (positions 561-588) rather than simple mean pooling. We will unfreeze 1 layer of the 150M model to prevent overfitting. We will also use mixed precision training (AMP) to speed up training and reduce memory usage. Decision: Update model.py to use ESM-2 150M and AttentionPooling. Update train.py and predict.py to use AMP. Train for 4 epochs and submit eval.
